CatalystsToTools.Notice: Fabricate migrated {count} catalyst(s) into shared library Tools. Catalysts are now Tools — manage them under the Tools tab of the Crafting System Manager.

UnifyRegions.Notice: Fabricate unified gathering realms for: {systems}. Realms are now geography only — Travel & Realms is disabled by default, so enable it per system to use travel. Realm-scoped tasks/events no longer match by realm and may now appear in more environments.

Aborted.Notice: Fabricate migration aborted. Your existing data has been kept unchanged. See the console (F12) for per-document recovery guidance.

Recovery.Title: Fabricate migration aborted
Recovery.Intro: A Fabricate data migration could not complete. Your existing data has been kept unchanged.
Recovery.Downgrade: Recommended: downgrade Fabricate to version {version} to keep using your existing data without manual remediation.
Recovery.RetryHint: To retry: fix or delete the documents above, then reload Foundry. The migration runs again automatically because it was not marked complete.
Recovery.FixAndRetryButton: I will manually fix or delete failed documents, then retry migration

Interactable.GMOnlySpawn: Only a GM can place Fabricate interactables on the canvas.
Interactable.NoActiveGM: A GM must be online to gather here.
Interactable.NoEnvironment: This gathering point is not part of any environment yet.
Interactable.EnvironmentDialogHint: Choose the gathering environment for this resource node.
Interactable.DropModifierHint: Hold Alt while dropping to always choose the environment manually.
Interactable.SpawnFailed: Failed to place the Fabricate interactable on the canvas.
Interactable.LinkedVisualMissing: This interactable's linked marker is missing.

Create.Unconfigured: Created an unconfigured Fabricate interactable. Configure its source (type, system, tool/task) from the Interactable config panel; it stays hidden and inert to players until then.

Denied.Consumed: This has already been used up.
Denied.UsesExhausted: There's nothing left to use here.
Denied.NotInside: Your token must be inside the area.
Denied.SourceMissing: This interactable is no longer available.
Denied.Unconfigured: This interactable hasn't been set up yet.
Denied.EnvironmentMissing: This gathering point's environment is missing.
Denied.Generic: You can't interact here right now.

Keybinding.Name: Fabricate: interact here
Keybinding.Hint: Re-open the Fabricate interactable your controlled token is standing in.

Config.Title: Fabricate Interactable
Config.Unavailable: This interactable could not be loaded.
Config.PromptPlaceholder: Shown to players in the interaction prompt
Config.DeletePrompt: Delete this interactable region? This cannot be undone.
Config.RemoveVisualPrompt: How would you like to remove the linked marker?
Config.NoSelection: Select a tile, drawing, or token on the canvas first.
Config.NoVisual: This interactable has no linked marker to jump to.

Node.Heading: Resource node
Node.LinkedHint: Depletion and respawn follow the gathering task's shared node.
Node.UnlinkedHint: Independent count, regeneration, and max — separate from the task.
Node.NoRestock: Cannot restock — this node does not regenerate.

Identity.Heading: Source
Identity.NeedsConfigHint: This interactable has no source yet. It stays hidden and inert to players until you choose its type and source below.

Manage.Title: Manage interactables
Manage.Empty: No interactables on this scene yet. Promote a region above, or drag one from the Interactable browser.
Manage.DeletePrompt: Delete this interactable region? This cannot be undone. (The linked marker, if any, is left on the scene.)
Manage.PromoteHint: Pick a region you already drew (any shape) and a Tool or Gathering Task source. The region becomes a working interactable.
Manage.PromoteInvalid: Choose a valid Tool or Gathering Task source.
Manage.PromoteFailed: Could not promote the region. Try again.
Manage.PromoteSuccess: Region promoted to a Fabricate interactable.

Browser.Title: Interactable browser
Browser.Hint: Drag an entry onto the canvas, or use Place on current scene.
Browser.RegionOnlyHint: The cubes button places a region with a tile marker; the outlined-square button places a region only, with no visible marker.
Browser.NoTasks: No gathering tasks in this system.

interactableType.label: Interactable type
interactableType.hint: Whether this region acts as a tool station or a gathering task.

sourceUuid.label: Source reference (advanced)
sourceUuid.hint: Internal identity of the linked tool or task. Edit from the Configure Fabricate Interactable window.

systemId.label: Crafting system (advanced)
systemId.hint: Internal id of the owning crafting system.

toolId.label: Tool reference (advanced)
toolId.hint: Internal id of the linked library tool.

taskId.label: Task reference (advanced)
taskId.hint: Internal id of the linked gathering task.

environmentId.label: Environment
environmentId.hint: The gathering environment this resource node belongs to.

taskNodeLink.label: Task node link (advanced)
taskNodeLink.hint: Whether this gathering task is linked to the gathering task's shared node pool or owns its own independent pool.

node.label: Independent resource node (advanced)
node.hint: This interactable's own resource node pool, used when it is unlinked from the gathering task. Edit from the Configure Fabricate Interactable window.

name.label: Name
name.hint: Display name shown to players when they can interact.

promptText.label: Prompt text
promptText.hint: Message shown to players on the interaction prompt.

hidden.label: Hidden from players
hidden.hint: Hide the interaction prompt from players.

uuid.label: Linked marker (advanced)
uuid.hint: Internal reference to the linked tile, drawing, or token.

documentName.label: Marker type (advanced)
documentName.hint: Whether the linked marker is a Tile, Drawing, or Token.

mode.label: Marker mode (advanced)
mode.hint: Whether this interactable shows a visible marker or is region-only.

missingPolicy.label: If the marker is missing
missingPolicy.hint: What to do when the linked marker can no longer be found.

node.label: Resource node (advanced)
node.hint: Snapshot of the gathering node's stock and respawn configuration.

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.hint: Whether players can currently activate this interactable.

consumed.label: Consumed
consumed.hint: Whether this interactable has been used up.

locked.label: Locked
locked.hint: Whether this interactable is locked against activation.

max.label: Maximum uses
max.hint: Total number of times this interactable may be used (blank for unlimited).

used.label: Uses spent
used.hint: How many times this interactable has been used.

seconds.label: Cooldown (seconds)
seconds.hint: Minimum world-time, in seconds, between activations (blank for none).

lastUsedWorldTime.label: Last used (advanced)
lastUsedWorldTime.hint: World time of the most recent activation.

trigger.label: Trigger
trigger.hint: How activation is initiated. Currently region entry.

audience.label: Who can activate
audience.hint: Whether only players or everyone can activate this interactable.

Inventory.NoActor: Select a character to see their crafting inventory.
Inventory.Empty: This character isn't carrying any crafting components yet.
Inventory.NoMatches: No items match the current filters.

Detail.SelectHint: Select an item to see its sources and where it's used.
Detail.ContributingEmpty: No owned components contribute this essence.
Detail.UsedByEmpty: Not used by any known recipe.
Detail.RequiredForEmpty: Not required as a tool by any known recipe.
Detail.ProducedByEmpty: Not produced by any known recipe, salvage, or gathering.

Crafting.NoActor: Select a character to see what they can craft.
Crafting.Empty: No recipes are available for this character yet.

Blocking.Locked: This recipe is locked by your GM.
Blocking.Unknown: You haven't learned this recipe yet.
Blocking.Exhausted: This recipe's source has no uses left.
Blocking.Discovery: Discover this recipe to reveal its details.

Detail.SelectHint: Select a recipe to see how to craft it.
Detail.NoOutcomes: This recipe has no routable outcomes configured.
Detail.ConsumeOnLearnWarning: Learning this recipe consumes the source item.
Detail.IngredientRoutingHint: The ingredient option you choose determines what you craft.
Detail.ProgressiveHint: This recipe is crafted over multiple steps.

Check.Title: Crafting check
Check.NoFormula: No roll formula is configured for this check.
Check.FormulaUnresolved: This check can't be resolved to a number for the selected character.

Shopping.Title: Shopping list
Shopping.Empty: Add recipes to plan the materials you'll need.

Notify.CraftFailed: Something went wrong while crafting. Nothing was consumed.

Sources.Label: Component sources
Sources.Empty: No other owned characters to add.

Empty.NoActor: Select a character to see their crafting, gathering, and salvage runs.
Empty.Detail: Select a run to see its details.

TimeRemaining.Title: Time remaining
TimeRemaining.WhenPassed: Ready to continue once enough world time has passed.
TimeRemaining.WhenPassedFinal: Ready to finish once enough world time has passed.

WhatToExpect.Title: What to expect
WhatToExpect.Crafting: This is a crafting run. Trigger the next step when its time gate has passed; each step rolls its crafting check and the run completes (or fails) once the final step resolves.
WhatToExpect.CraftingSingleStep: This is a crafting run. Once its time gate has passed, finish crafting to roll its crafting check — the run completes (or fails) on that result.
WhatToExpect.Gathering: This is a gathering run. It resolves automatically as world time advances — no action is needed from you.
WhatToExpect.Salvage: This is a salvage run. It resolves automatically as world time advances — no action is needed from you.

Tips.Title: Tips
Tips.WorldTime: Countdowns use world time, not real time — they only move when your GM advances the game clock.
Tips.Trigger: Crafting steps are triggered manually once their time gate has passed.
Tips.History: Completed runs and their results stay in your history.

Actions.TriggerHint: Advance this run to roll the next step's crafting check.
Actions.FinishHint: Resolve this run's final crafting check.
Actions.AutoResolve: Resolves automatically when the world time advances.
Actions.WaitingHint: Waiting for enough world time to pass before the next step can be triggered.
Actions.NeedsOwner: You must own the source character (or ask your GM) to advance this run.

Environments.Title: Environments
Environments.Hint: Choose a place to gather. Locked environments are unavailable until your GM enables them.
Environments.Empty: No gathering environments are available for this character yet.
Environments.HideUnavailableTooltip: Hide environments that are currently unavailable — locked, out-of-realm, or scene-gated.

Detail.SelectHint: Select an available environment from the left menu.
Detail.BlindHint: This is a blind gathering site. Attempt a gather to discover what it yields.
Detail.TargetedHint: Choose a task below to attempt.
Detail.SceneGateHint: You can't gather here until you visit the linked scene below.
Detail.EventChanceHint: Your chance of encountering an event while gathering here.
Detail.EventSafeHint: No events occur while gathering here.
Detail.EventsHiddenHint: The events here are hidden until you gather.
Detail.EventRiskNote: Events can occur in this area.
Detail.SelectEventHint: Select an event to see its details.
Detail.AwardModeHighest: Only your single best successful find is awarded.
Detail.AwardModeLimited: Up to {x} of your successful finds are awarded.
Detail.EventImpactSuccess: If an event occurs, your gather still succeeds.
Detail.EventImpactFailure: If an event occurs, the gather fails.
Detail.SceneWait: Wait until the GM activates the linked scene.
Detail.NodesLegend: This area's resources are limited and replenish over time.
Detail.NodeExhaustedPermanent: Exhausted — this resource will not replenish.

Theme.Name: Fabricate Theme
Theme.Hint: Choose the colour theme for Fabricate's module UI.

ExperimentalFeatures.Name: Experimental Features
ExperimentalFeatures.Hint: Reserved for future experimental Fabricate features in this world. No current features are gated by this switch. Disabled by default.

RepairComponentSources.Name: Repair Component Sources
RepairComponentSources.Label: Repair Component Sources
RepairComponentSources.Hint: Reconcile the source items behind your crafting components so inventory copies match reliably. Fixes items that were built by copying another item as a template.
RepairComponentSources.Title: Repair Component Sources
RepairComponentSources.Body: This scans your world items and unlocked compendiums, tags each component's source item with a durable component link, and clears misleading duplicate-source metadata. Locked (system/module) compendiums are skipped. Continue?
RepairComponentSources.Success: Component sources repaired: {stamped} tagged, {stripped} cleaned, {cleared} unlinked ({scanned} scanned, {skippedLocked} locked packs skipped).
RepairComponentSources.Failed: Component source repair failed. See the console for details.
RepairComponentSources.Unavailable: Fabricate is not ready — try again once the world has finished loading.

InteractionPromptPosition.Name: Interaction Prompt Position
InteractionPromptPosition.Hint: Where the region-entry interaction prompt appears on your screen. Move it away from other modules' on-screen widgets. Default: Bottom Center.

Knowledge.LearningDisabled: Learning is not enabled for this crafting system
Knowledge.LinkedItemRequired: Recipe item link is required to learn this recipe
Knowledge.NoMatchingItem: No matching recipe item available to learn
Knowledge.LearnBudgetSpent: This recipe item has no learning uses left.
Knowledge.NoNewRecipesLearned: {actor} already knows the matched recipe item recipes.

Manager.GMOnly: Only GMs can manage crafting systems.

Resolution.D100Desc: Each attempt rolls a d100 against the task’s drop tables to determine what is gathered.
Resolution.ProgressiveDesc: A numeric check awards every drop whose difficulty threshold is met.
Resolution.RoutedDesc: The gathering check outcome selects which drop group is returned.

Economy.ModeHint: How this system limits how often tasks can be attempted.

Mode.None: No limit — tasks can be attempted freely.

Economy.RegenHint: How much stamina actors recover as world time passes.
Economy.MaxStaminaHint: A number or formula, rolled once per character (e.g. 40 or 4 * @abilities.con.mod). Starting stamina is the value characters begin at — blank means full. See the Gathering Formulas help page for examples.
Economy.RollHint: Roll this character's pool from the max/start expressions
Economy.ResetHint: Re-roll this character's pool from the max/start expressions
Economy.RegenAmountHint: A number or formula, evaluated for each character (e.g. 1 or 1 + @abilities.con.mod). See the Gathering Formulas help page for examples.
Economy.NodesNote: Set each task's node count and respawn on the environment's task inspector.
Economy.NodeStockHint: How many resource nodes remain for this task in this environment.
Economy.TaskStaminaHint: Stamina spent per attempt when this system has stamina enabled.
Economy.TaskStaminaModifiersHint: Adjust the cost for an actor (e.g. a strong character mines for less).
Economy.TaskNodesHint: Finite nodes for this task, depleted as it is gathered and optionally respawning over world time.
Economy.TaskNodesEconomyHint: Canvas per-tile depletion and depleted-tile behavior are only available when this system has resource nodes enabled. Turn on the Resource nodes toggle in the system's Economy settings to author a resource node here.
Economy.RespawnAmountHint: Plain dice only (e.g. 1d4) — no character data.
Economy.DepletedBehaviorHint: How a placed interactable's linked marker looks once this node runs out. Restored automatically when it respawns.

Manager.StartupPending: Fabricate is still loading. The crafting system manager will open when startup finishes.
Manager.Title: Crafting systems
Manager.Subtitle: Manage the system definitions that organize Fabricate components, recipes, gathering, and feature rules.
Manager.SelectSystemHint: Select a system to inspect its configuration.
Manager.SystemLibraryHint: Select a row to view counts and enabled features.
Manager.LoadingSystemsHint: Fabricate is finishing startup before the system library is shown.
Manager.EmptyHint: Create a system to start organizing components and recipes.
Manager.EmptySearchHint: Clear the search to show all configured systems.
Manager.InspectorHint: The inspector shows counts, resolution mode, and enabled features for the selected system.

EmptySetup.Title: Set up your first system
EmptySetup.Hint: Create a crafting system, add item-backed components, then build recipes from those components.
EmptySetup.StepSystem: Create a system for one crafting discipline or ruleset.
EmptySetup.StepComponents: Import world or compendium items as reusable components.
EmptySetup.StepRecipes: Add recipes that consume components and award results.

Manager.PlannedView: {view} is planned for a future release.

SystemEdit.Title: System settings
SystemEdit.Subtitle: Edit base settings for the selected crafting system.
SystemEdit.PageSubtitle: Edit base settings and review validation issues for the selected crafting system.
SystemEdit.EditBaseSettingsHint: Changes use the existing admin store persistence and confirmation flows.
SystemEdit.BlockerBody: Players cannot see or use any of this system's recipes until the blocker is resolved. Open the system overview to review and fix it.
SystemEdit.ResolutionModeHint: Changing resolution mode migrates your recipes to the new mode where possible; recipes that cannot be migrated to the new mode are deleted. Export the system to create a backup if needed.
SystemEdit.NoFeatureToggles: No optional feature toggles are present on this system.
SystemEdit.DeepConfigHint: Categories, tags, essences, checks, requirements, visibility, alchemy, and gathering configuration stay in later manager views.

FeatureHint.Gathering: Shows gathering environments and player gathering flows for this system.
FeatureHint.Salvage: Enables component salvage and the salvage check configuration for this system.
FeatureHint.RecipeCategories: Adds category organization to recipe browsing and authoring.
FeatureHint.ItemTags: Enables managed component tags and tag-based ingredient options.
FeatureHint.Essences: Enables essence definitions and essence requirements.
FeatureHint.MultiStepRecipes: Enables explicit recipe steps and step-level requirements.
FeatureHint.CraftingChecks: Enables system-level crafting check configuration in the current admin.
FeatureHint.OutcomeRouting: Enables routed outcome configuration where supported.
FeatureHint.EffectTransfer: Allows crafted results to inherit effects from source components.
FeatureHint.ChatOutput: Posts a summary chat card after crafting and gathering attempts.
FeatureHint.Currency: Enables the currency configuration for this system.

SystemOverview.Title: System overview
SystemOverview.Heading: Validation overview
SystemOverview.Subtitle: Review every validation issue across this crafting system and jump straight to the editor that owns each one.
SystemOverview.Empty: No validation issues detected. Everything in this system is ready to use.
SystemOverview.BlockerNote: This system has a blocker: players cannot see or use any of its recipes until it is resolved.
SystemOverview.IssueNoIngredientSet: A step has no ingredient set.
SystemOverview.IssueNoResultGroup: A step has no result set.
SystemOverview.IssueDuplicateAlternative: An OR group repeats the same match.
SystemOverview.IssueDuplicateRequirement: A set repeats the same ingredient requirement.
SystemOverview.IssueRequirementOverlap: Two requirements in a set can be satisfied by the same component.
SystemOverview.IssueUnroutedResultGroup: A result set is not assigned to any check outcome.
SystemOverview.IssueUnproducedOutcomeTier: A check outcome produces no result set.
SystemOverview.IssueDisabledIncomplete: The recipe is disabled and cannot be enabled until its gaps are fixed.
SystemOverview.IssueNoAvailableTasks: The environment composes no available gathering tasks.
SystemOverview.IssueActiveNoComposition: The environment is on but composes no available tasks.
SystemOverview.IssueStaleIncluded: The environment includes a record that is no longer available.
SystemOverview.IssueNoScene: The environment has no linked scene.
SystemOverview.IssueNoEventsAtDanger: The environment carries danger but composes no events.
SystemOverview.IssueTaskNoDescription: A gathering task has no description.
SystemOverview.IssueLocallyExcluded: Some records are excluded for this environment.
SystemOverview.IssueInvalidSalvage: The component salvage is invalid for the current salvage mode.
SystemOverview.IssueRoutedCheckNoFormula: This routed system has no crafting check roll formula; recipes that route by the check provider will not resolve until one is configured.
SystemOverview.IssueSalvageRoutedNoFormula: Routed salvage has no roll formula; salvage will not resolve until one is configured.
SystemOverview.IssueSalvageRoutedNoTiers: Routed salvage has no outcome tiers; configure salvage outcome tiers so salvage can be routed.
SystemOverview.IssueProgressiveNoCheck: Progressive mode requires a configured progressive crafting check.
SystemOverview.IssueProgressiveNoDifficulty: Progressive mode requires at least one component with a difficulty of 1 or more.
SystemOverview.IssueMultiStepInAlchemy: Multi-step recipes cannot be used while the system is in alchemy mode.
SystemOverview.IssueAlchemySignatureCollision: Two recipes share an ingredient signature, so alchemy attempts are ambiguous.

Recipe.Title: Recipes
Recipe.Subtitle: Manage recipes for the selected crafting system.
Recipe.LibraryHint: Browse recipes for the selected system and open the recipe editor for changes.
Recipe.CategoryNoneHint: No categories defined. Add some under Tags and Categories.
Recipe.EmptyHint: Create recipes for the selected crafting system.
Recipe.EmptySearchHint: Clear search and filters to show all recipes in this system.
Recipe.SingleStepHint: The recipe is crafted in a single step.
Recipe.MultiStepHint: Author an ordered list of named steps in the editor.
Recipe.SimpleHint: One set of ingredients makes one result.
Recipe.ComplexHint: Author multiple ingredient sets and result sets.
Recipe.CheckRoutingHint: The crafting check's outcome selects which result group is produced.
Recipe.IngredientRoutingHint: The chosen ingredient set selects which result group is produced.
Recipe.StepsHint: Order the named steps used to craft this recipe. Drag to reorder.
Recipe.RevertToSingleStepContent: Switching {name} back to single-step removes its extra steps and their names, descriptions, and time/currency requirements. This can't be undone.
Recipe.SwitchToSimpleContent: Switching {name} to simple keeps only the first ingredient set and result set{perStep}; any others are removed. This can't be undone.
Recipe.DeleteStepContent: Deleting {name} removes the whole step — {alsoDeleted}. This can't be undone.
Recipe.DeleteStepAlsoIngredients: its results and tools are deleted too
Recipe.DeleteStepAlsoResults: its ingredients and tools are deleted too
Recipe.DeleteStepAlsoTools: its ingredients and results are deleted too
Recipe.DeleteStepAlsoAll: its ingredients, results, and tools are deleted too
Recipe.DurationHint: How long this recipe takes to craft. Leave blank for an instant craft.
Recipe.IngredientsEmptyHint: Add a set of ingredients required to craft this recipe.
Recipe.SetEmptyHint: Add a component or a tag requirement this set must satisfy.
Recipe.ResultsEmptyHint: Add a set of items this recipe can produce.
Recipe.RoutingNoIngredientSets: Add a named ingredient set first.
Recipe.RoutingNoOutcomeTiers: Define outcome tiers in the routed crafting check first.
Recipe.RoutingNoSuccessOutcomeTiers: No outcome tier is marked as a Success. Mark one as Success in the crafting check to route a result set to it.
Recipe.ResultSetEmptyHint: Add an item this recipe produces.
Recipe.ToolsEmptyHint: Add a tool required to craft.
Recipe.NoStepsHint: Add a step in Overview to configure this section.

Validation.Title: Validation
Validation.CheckIngredientSet: Every step has at least one ingredient set
Validation.CheckResultGroup: Every step has at least one result set
Validation.CheckNoDuplicateMatches: No duplicate component or tag matches
Validation.CheckRoutedResultGroupsRouted: Every check-mode result set is assigned a check outcome
Validation.CheckRoutedOutcomeTiersProduced: Every check success outcome produces a result set
Validation.IssueNoIngredientSet: A step has no ingredient set.
Validation.IssueNoResultGroup: A step has no result set.
Validation.IssueDisabledIncomplete: The recipe is disabled and cannot be enabled until its requirements are complete.
Validation.IssueDuplicateAlternative: An OR group repeats the same component or tag match.
Validation.IssueDuplicateRequirement: A set repeats the same ingredient requirement.
Validation.IssueRequirementOverlap: Two requirements in a set can be satisfied by the same component (ambiguous).
Validation.IssueUnroutedResultGroup: A result set is not assigned to any check outcome and will never be produced.
Validation.IssueUnproducedOutcomeTier: A check outcome is not assigned to any result set, so it produces nothing.

Recipe.InspectorHint: The inspector shows recipe status, structure, and requirements for the selected row.
Recipe.EditSubtitle: Edit identity and the linked recipe item for this recipe.
Recipe.EditMissingHint: Pick a recipe from the browser to open its editor.
Recipe.IdentityHint: Name the recipe, describe it, choose an image, and toggle whether it is active.
Recipe.Name: Name
Recipe.MinSuccessTierHint: Fail the craft outright when the roll lands below this tier.
Recipe.RecipeItemLockedImage: Image provided by the linked recipe item
Recipe.RecipeItemLockedImageTooltip: This image comes from the linked recipe item and can't be edited. Unlink the recipe item to choose a custom image.
Recipe.RecipeItemDropHint: Drag an item here to link it.
Recipe.RecipeItemReplaceHint: Drop an item to replace it, or right-click to unlink.
Recipe.DiscardDirtyContent: The current recipe has unsaved changes. Save them and continue, or discard them?
Recipe.SaveFailed: Save failed. Check for duplicate or blank names and try again.

Visibility.Title: Visibility
Visibility.RestrictHint: Restrict this recipe to specific players. When off, every player can see it.
Visibility.NoWorldUsers: No non-GM players exist in this world yet.
Visibility.NoUsersSelected: Restricted with no users selected — no player can see this recipe.

EmptySetup.Title: Set up recipes
EmptySetup.Hint: Create the first recipe for this system after its reusable components are available.
EmptySetup.NoComponentsHint: Add components before creating recipes so ingredients, tools, and results have reusable items to reference.
EmptySetup.StepStructure: Choose the recipe structure supported by the selected system.
EmptySetup.StepRequirements: Add ingredient sets, tools, and any visibility or timing requirements.
EmptySetup.StepResults: Define result sets and enable the recipe when it is ready for players.
EmptySetup.NoComponentsStepComponents: Open Components and drop world, compendium, pack, or folder items into this system.
EmptySetup.NoComponentsStepOrganize: Review component names, source links, tags, essences, and difficulty metadata.
EmptySetup.NoComponentsStepRecipes: Return to Recipes and build requirements and results from those components.

Component.Title: Components
Component.Subtitle: Manage item-backed components for the selected crafting system.
Component.LibraryHint: Browse item-backed components and open the existing component editor for changes.
Component.DropZoneLabel: Drop Foundry items to add components
Component.DropZoneHint: World, compendium, pack, or folder drops use the existing component import flow for the selected system.
Component.EmptyHint: Drop Foundry items into this page to add components to the selected system.
Component.EmptySearchHint: Clear search and filters to show all components in this system.
Component.ProgressiveDifficultyHint: Cost spent against the crafting roll in progressive mode. Whole number, 1 or greater; leave blank to clear. Saved with the editor.
Component.SourceHint: This component keeps a stored source ID for import matching and replacement.
Component.SourceMissingHint: The stored source no longer resolves. Replace the component source or verify the original compendium/world item still exists.
Component.NoSourceHint: This component does not expose a stored source UUID in the current item-card data.
Component.InspectorHint: The inspector shows component identity, origin, tags, essences, and source copy context for the selected row.

EmptySetup.Title: Set up components
EmptySetup.Hint: Import item-backed components before recipes can reference ingredients, tools, results, or essence sources.
EmptySetup.StepImport: Drop world, compendium, pack, or folder items into the component browser.
EmptySetup.StepOrganize: Add tags, essences, source links, and difficulty metadata where the selected system uses them.
EmptySetup.StepRecipes: Use the managed components as recipe requirements, tools, and results.

Component.EditSubtitle: Update tags, essences, and source linkage for this component.
Component.EditMissingHint: Pick a component from the browser to edit its tags, essences, and source linkage.
Component.DiscardDirtyContent: The current component has unsaved changes. Save them and continue, or discard them?
Component.SaveFailed: Save failed. Try again or refresh the manager.

Identity.Title: Identity
Identity.SourceBackedHint: This component is backed by a Foundry item. Changes to its source item's name, image, or description will be reflected here.
Identity.SourceLockedImage: Image provided by the linked Foundry item
Identity.SourceLockedImageTooltip: This image comes from the linked Foundry item and can't be edited here.
Identity.LockedFieldTooltip: Provided by the linked Foundry item and can't be edited here.

SourceCard.Title: Linked Source Item
SourceCard.ReplaceHint: Drop a Foundry item to replace it, or right-click to unlink.
SourceCard.NoSourceHint: Drop or replace a Foundry item to link this component to a source.

TagsEdit.Title: Tags
TagsEdit.Hint: Add the item tags that apply to this component.
TagsEdit.NoTags: No tags are defined for this system yet.

EssencesEdit.Title: Essences
EssencesEdit.Hint: Set how much of each essence this component contributes.
EssencesEdit.NoEssences: No essences are defined for this system yet.

TagsCategories.Title: Tags & Categories
TagsCategories.Subtitle: Manage recipe category and item tag vocabulary for the selected crafting system.
TagsCategories.LibraryHint: Define recipe categories and item tags before assigning them elsewhere.
TagsCategories.CategoriesHint: General is always available. Add custom categories for recipes that need clearer grouping.
TagsCategories.ItemTagsHint: Use item tags for component organization and tag-based ingredient options.
TagsCategories.GeneralInspectorHint: General is the built-in category for recipes without a custom category and cannot be removed.
TagsCategories.OnlyGeneralHint: Add a custom category when recipes need more specific grouping.
TagsCategories.NoCategoryMatches: No custom categories match this search.
TagsCategories.NoTagsHint: Add tags before using tag-based ingredient options.
TagsCategories.NoTagMatches: No item tags match this search.
TagsCategories.RemoveCategoryConfirm: Remove {name}? {count} references may keep this category value until you update them.
TagsCategories.RemoveTagConfirm: Remove {name}? {count} references may keep this tag value until you update them.
TagsCategories.BlankCategoryFeedback: Enter a category name before adding it.
TagsCategories.GeneralReservedFeedback: General is already available as the base category.
TagsCategories.BlankTagFeedback: Enter a tag name before adding it.
TagsCategories.TagNormalizedFeedback: Tag added with cleaned-up lowercase text.
TagsCategories.InspectorHint: Define the vocabulary GMs use when assigning recipe categories and component tags.
TagsCategories.HowItWorksFlat: Categories are flat — each recipe picks one, with no parent or child folders.
TagsCategories.HowItWorksGeneral: General is the reserved fallback for recipes without a custom category.
TagsCategories.HowItWorksTags: Item tags appear on components and on tag-placeholder ingredients in recipes.
TagsCategories.ExamplesEmptyHint: Add a category or tag, then assign it to a recipe or component to see it appear here.

Essence.Title: Essences
Essence.Subtitle: Manage essence definitions for the selected crafting system.
Essence.LibraryHint: Browse, create, and maintain essence definitions for the selected crafting system.
Essence.CreateSubtitle: Define identity, icon, and source linkage for a new essence.
Essence.CreateNoSourceSubtitle: Define identity and icon for a new essence.
Essence.CreateBandHint: Create and edit essences in the dedicated editor so browse rows stay selection-only.
Essence.EditSubtitle: Update identity, icon, and source linkage for this essence.
Essence.EditNoSourceSubtitle: Update identity and icon for this essence.
Essence.EditHint: Edit identity, icon, and source linkage for the selected essence definition.
Essence.Name: Name
Essence.SourceNoUuid: This component has no source item UUID.
Essence.SourceEvidenceHint: Stored source evidence remains readable until you clear or repair it.
Essence.SourceEditHint: Pick or drop a managed component to provide the effect-transfer source.
Essence.EmptyHint: Create an essence definition to start assigning essence quantities to components.
Essence.EmptySearchHint: Clear search and filters to show all essences in this system.
Essence.SaveFailed: Save failed. Check for duplicate or blank names and try again.
Essence.DiscardDirtyContent: The current essence has unsaved changes. Save them and continue, or discard them?
Essence.DeleteBlocked: Remove component usage before deleting this essence.
Essence.UsageBlockedHint: Remove this essence from components before deleting the definition.
Essence.InspectorHint: The inspector shows source linkage and component usage for the selected essence.
Essence.InspectorNoSourceHint: The inspector shows identity and component usage for the selected essence.
Essence.CreateInspectorHint: The inspector will show the essence ID after the draft is saved.

EmptySetup.Title: Set up essences
EmptySetup.Hint: Create the first essence definition for this system, then assign quantities to components that should contribute that essence.
EmptySetup.StepCreate: Create an essence with a clear name, icon, and description.
EmptySetup.StepAssign: Edit components to assign essence quantities that recipes can require.
EmptySetup.StepTransfer: If effect transfer is enabled, link source components whose effects should carry to crafted results.

Environment.Title: Environments
Environment.Subtitle: Manage gathering environments for the selected crafting system.
Environment.EditSubtitle: Edit scene linkage, identity, tasks, events, tools, and validation for the selected environment.
Environment.LibraryHint: Browse scene-linked gathering environments and open the existing editor for task authoring.

RealmToggle.Title: Travel & Realms
RealmToggle.Hint: Enabling this reveals the Travel tab, where you build realms and place parties, and lets environments be assigned to realms. Leave it off if your game does not use travel or location-gated gathering.

GatheringTabs.Label: Gathering sections
GatheringTabs.ToolsHint: Manage reusable gathering tools for this crafting system.
GatheringTabs.TasksHint: Browse gathering tasks before attaching them to environments.
GatheringTabs.EncountersHint: Browse reusable events before attaching them to environments.
GatheringTabs.TravelHint: Manage Fabricate parties and set the current realm for this crafting system.
GatheringTabs.SettingsPlaceholderHint: Set system-level drop resolution and event rules for gathering.

Tasks.NotUsedInEnvironments: Not used in any environments yet.
Tasks.EmptyHint: Create gathering tasks before attaching them to environments.
Tasks.EmptySearchTitle: No gathering tasks match these filters
Tasks.EmptySearchHint: Clear search and filters to show all gathering tasks in this system.
Tasks.InspectorHint: The inspector shows gathering task availability, active environment matches, and drop summaries for the selected row.
Tasks.EditSubtitle: Edit availability, identity, and drop rules for the selected gathering task.
Tasks.DiscardChangesPrompt: The current gathering task has unsaved changes. Save them and continue, or discard them?

CompositionLossWarning.Title: This task will leave some environments
CompositionLossWarning.Body: Saving removes this task from these environments:

Tasks.DisabledNotice: Disabled task “{name}” — no longer available in {count} environment(s): {environments}.
Tasks.PlaceholderHint: Detailed authoring fields for gathering tasks are coming later. Use the task browser for selection, duplication, deletion, and status for now.
Tasks.TaskIdentityHint: Name the task, give it a description, choose an image, and toggle whether it is enabled.
Tasks.Name: Name
Tasks.DefaultEnvironmentHint: Used when a dropped node is not inside a tagged scene region. Hold Alt while dropping to always pick manually.
Tasks.DisabledHint: Not available to use in environments.
Tasks.AvailabilityHint: Availability controls whether this task can be attempted. Individual drops can still have their own time and weather modifiers.
Tasks.RequiredToolsHint: Pick tools the actor must wield to attempt this task. All listed tools are required.
Tasks.RequiredToolsLibraryEmptyTitle: No tools in this system's library
Tasks.RequiredToolsLibraryEmptyHint: Open the Tools page from the left rail to add tools first.
Tasks.DropRulesHint: Configure what can drop, how often, and which conditions modify each drop.
Tasks.BiomeModifiersHint: Adjust this drop's chance based on the gathering environment's biomes.
Tasks.WeatherModifiersHint: Adjust this drop's chance based on the active weather condition.
Tasks.TimeModifiersHint: Adjust this drop's chance based on the active time of day.
Tasks.ModifiersApplyOnlyThisDrop: Modifiers below apply only to this drop.
Tasks.ComponentBrowserHint: Drag a component onto any drop rule row to assign or replace it.
Tasks.EmptyDropSearchTitle: No drop rules match this search
Tasks.DropCalculationHelp: Final drop chance = base chance + matching drop modifiers + environment and actor specific modifiers
Tasks.RewardRuleNotice: Multiple drop rows use this component. Current drop rules may award only one matching row.

Events.DangerTagsHint: Danger tags let environments opt in to this event. Empty matches any environment danger profile.
Events.DropRateHint: Chance from 1 to 100 that this event drops on a matching gathering attempt before modifiers.
Events.BiomeModifiersHint: Adjust this event's chance based on the gathering environment's biomes.
Events.WeatherModifiersHint: Adjust this event's chance based on the active weather condition.
Events.TimeModifiersHint: Adjust this event's chance based on the active time of day.
Events.DropRateInvalid: Drop rate must be between 1 and 100.
Events.SceneLinkHint: Optionally link a scene to open when this event is triggered.
Events.SceneDropHint: Drag a scene here to link it.
Events.SceneRemoveTooltip: Right-click to remove the linked scene

EventScenePrompt.Title: An event occurred
EventScenePrompt.Missing: The event's linked scene could not be found.

Events.EmptyHint: Create reusable events before attaching them to environments.
Events.EmptySearchHint: Clear search and filters to show all events in this system.
Events.SelectEventHint: Choose an event from the browser to edit its identity, matching, and modifiers.
Events.InspectorHint: The inspector shows event availability, danger tags, drop rate, and active environment usage for the selected row.
Events.NotUsedInEnvironments: Not used in any environments yet.
Events.EditSubtitle: Edit identity, availability, danger, and modifiers for the selected event.
Events.DiscardChangesPrompt: The current event has unsaved changes. Save them and continue, or discard them?

CompositionLossWarning.Title: This event will leave some environments
CompositionLossWarning.Body: Saving removes this event from these environments:

Events.DisabledNotice: Disabled event “{name}” — no longer available in {count} environment(s): {environments}.
Events.DeleteConfirm: Delete this event? This cannot be undone.
Events.EventIdentityHint: Name the event, give it a description, choose an image, and toggle whether it is enabled.
Events.AvailabilityHint: Events match environments by region, biome, weather, and time of day. Empty fields mean "matches any".
Events.Name: Name
Events.EnabledHint: This event is available when its tags match.
Events.DisabledHint: Disabled events never match player gathering.
Events.EventModifierHint: Adjusts the d100 roll added before threshold comparison. Leave empty for no modifier.
Events.CharacterModifiersHint: Pick reusable actor-driven modifiers from the per-system library. These adjust the threshold, not the roll.
Events.CharacterModifiersEmptyLibrary: No character modifiers exist in this system yet. Add them in the Character Modifiers library first.
Events.CharacterModifierOverridePlaceholder: Leave empty to use library expression

Rules.Title: Rules
Rules.DropModifierModeDescription: Choose how all drop and event modifiers (character, weather, time of day, biome) adjust a chance. This applies system-wide and cannot be overridden per modifier.
Rules.EventsDescription: Choose how matching events are applied after a gathering roll.
Rules.EventOutcomeDescription: Decide whether rolling an event still allows the gathering attempt to succeed.
Rules.EventVisibilityDescription: Control how much event information players see.
Rules.ToolBreakageDescription: Decide whether a broken tool fails the gathering attempt or only reports the breakage.
Rules.BiomeModifiersDescription: Decide how multiple matching biome modifiers combine into one drop-rate adjustment.
Rules.BlindCandidateGateDescription: In blind mode, choose whether the generic gather only resolves to tasks the character can attempt, or to any matching task.
Rules.RevealPolicyDescription: Decide whether a blind task is revealed to the player after they attempt it.
Rules.RevealScopeDescription: Who learns the revealed task: just the actor, the controlling user, the party, or everyone.

Conditions.TimeOfDayHint: These values control current time matching for gathering tasks and events. Click the name of a time of day to edit it.
Conditions.WeatherHint: These values control weather matching for gathering tasks and events. Click the name of a condition to edit it.

Vocabularies.BiomesHint: Environments can have multiple biomes. Left-click the icon to swap it out, right-click to change the colour.

Environment.EmptyHint: Define gathering tasks and events before creating environments, then attach those building blocks to each location players can gather from.
Environment.EmptySearchHint: Clear search and filters to show all environments in this system.
Environment.InspectorHint: The inspector shows scene imagery, task evidence, draft state, and existing actions for the selected row.

EmptySetup.Title: Plan gathering content
EmptySetup.Hint: Gathering tasks and events give environments consistent activities, risks, and rewards across gathering locations.
EmptySetup.StepCreate: Create environments after the gathering task and event libraries are ready to attach.
EmptySetup.StepLocation: Link a Foundry scene or write enough location detail for GMs and players.
EmptySetup.StepTasks: Define gathering tasks with their checks, timing, result groups, and failure outcomes.
EmptySetup.StepEvents: Prepare event options that can be reused across your locations.

Environment.EditHint: Edit scene linkage, environment details, tasks, results, tools, visibility, timing, and validation through the existing draft callbacks.
Environment.EnabledHint: Available to players when the scene matches.
Environment.SceneDropHint: Drag a scene from the Scenes sidebar to link it
Environment.SceneDropReplaceHint: Drag a different scene here to replace this link
Environment.NoValidationIssues: No validation issues are currently reported.
Environment.NoCheckTaskFieldsHint: Routed tasks use result selection from the Results tab.

Composition.AutomaticHint: All matching enabled tasks and events are available unless locally excluded.
Composition.ManualHint: Only explicitly included tasks and events are available; GMs can force add enabled non-matching tasks and events.
Composition.NoIncludedTasks: No tasks are available in this environment yet.
Composition.NoIncludedEvents: No events are available in this environment yet.
Composition.NoCandidateTasks: No further matching tasks to include.
Composition.NoCandidateEvents: No further matching events to include.
Composition.NoAvailableTasksToAdd: No matching or non-matching tasks to add.
Composition.NoAvailableEventsToAdd: No matching or non-matching events to add.

Overview.Title: Overview
Overview.IdentityHint: Name the environment, describe it, choose an image, and toggle whether it is active.
Overview.SceneLockedImage: Image provided by the linked scene
Overview.SceneLockedImageTooltip: This image comes from the linked scene and can't be edited. Unlink the scene to choose a custom image.
Overview.Name: Name
Overview.RealmsHint: Which realms this environment belongs to. Players can gather here when their party is in one of these realms.
Overview.RealmsEmpty: No realms yet. Create realms in the Travel tab first.
Overview.BiomesHint: The terrain here. Tasks and events match if they share one or more biomes.
Overview.DangerHint: A ceiling — events up to and including this level can appear.
Overview.BlindHint: Players get a generic gather action unless tasks are revealed.
Overview.SceneDropHint: Drag a scene here to link it.
Overview.SceneReplaceTooltip: Drop a scene to replace it, or right-click to unlink.

Inspector.Label: Environment inspector
Inspector.NoActiveTasksHint: Add or include tasks in this environment so they appear here.
Inspector.NoActiveEventsHint: Add or include events in this environment so they appear here.
Inspector.SourceHintTask: Composing this task does not modify the reusable source.
Inspector.SourceHintEvent: Composing this event does not modify the reusable source.
Inspector.StaleEvent: This event is included in this environment but is unavailable because it no longer matches the environment context.
Inspector.StaleTask: This task is included in this environment but is unavailable because it no longer matches the environment context.
Inspector.OverridesHintTask: Drop-rate adjustments apply only in this environment and do not modify the reusable source task.
Inspector.OverridesHintEvent: Drop-rate adjustments apply only in this environment and do not modify the reusable source event.
Inspector.NoDropRows: This task has no drop rows to adjust.

Validation.Title: Validation
Validation.CheckAvailableTask: Has at least one available task
Validation.CheckNoStale: Has no stale included tasks or events
Validation.IssueNoAvailableTasks: No tasks are available to players.
Validation.IssueActiveNoComposition: Environment is active but has no valid task composition.
Validation.IssueStaleIncluded: Included task or event no longer matches the environment.
Validation.IssueStaleIncludedTask: The task "{name}" no longer matches this environment.
Validation.IssueStaleIncludedEvent: The event "{name}" no longer matches this environment.
Validation.IssueNoEventsAtDanger: Danger is set but no events are available.
Validation.IssueTaskNoDescription: Available task has no player-facing description.
Validation.IssueTaskNoDescriptionTask: The task "{name}" has no player-facing description.
Validation.IssueLocallyExcluded: Some tasks or events are excluded locally.

Tasks.Title: Tasks
Tasks.AutomaticIntro: All matching enabled library tasks are available unless you exclude them here.
Tasks.ManualIntro: Only tasks you explicitly include are available to players. You can add matching tasks or force add non-matching tasks.

Events.Title: Events
Events.AutomaticIntro: All matching enabled library events apply unless you exclude them here.
Events.ManualIntro: Only events you explicitly include apply here. You can add matching events or force add non-matching events.

CharacterModifiers.Title: Character modifiers
CharacterModifiers.Hint: Define reusable actor-driven modifiers for this system's gathering rows and events.
CharacterModifiers.Label: Label
CharacterModifiers.SeedPresetsUnsupported: Preset seeding is only available for dnd5e or pf2e worlds.
CharacterModifiers.EmptyForRow: No character modifier references on this row.
CharacterModifiers.LibraryEmptyHint: Add a modifier to the system library first to reference it here.
CharacterModifiers.RowSectionHint: Modifiers adjust the final chance based on the attempting character.
CharacterModifiers.OverrideHint: Overrides the library expression for this row.

Gathering.TaskDcOverrideHint: Override the system gathering check DC for this task. Leave blank to use the system default.

CurrencyUnits.Title: Currency units
CurrencyUnits.Hint: Define actor currency paths and denomination breakdowns for this crafting system.
CurrencyUnits.Label: Label
CurrencyUnits.SeedPresetsUnsupported: Preset seeding is only available for dnd5e or pf2e worlds.
CurrencyUnits.NoSubUnits: This unit is a base denomination.
CurrencyUnits.NoOtherUnits: Add another currency unit before defining a breakdown.
CurrencyUnits.SpendStrategyHint: Choose how this system reads and spends actor currency.
CurrencyUnits.SpendStrategyActorPropertyHint: Read and spend coins at a flat actor data path (e.g. dnd5e currency).
CurrencyUnits.SpendStrategyActorInventoryHint: Use a preconfigured provider that reads and spends coins from the actor inventory (e.g. pf2e).
CurrencyUnits.SpendStrategyMacroHint: Drive currency with your own macros; the macro receives the actor and does whatever it needs.
CurrencyUnits.ProviderHint: A preconfigured adapter that reads and spends coins from the actor inventory.
CurrencyUnits.NoProviders: No preconfigured providers for this system — use the Macro strategy instead.
CurrencyUnits.MacroCanAffordHint: Runs to gate the craft; return true (or { canAfford: true }) when the actor can pay.
CurrencyUnits.MacroIncrementHint: Reserved for a future refund flow — configured now but not yet invoked.
CurrencyUnits.MacroDecrementHint: Runs after a successful craft to spend the currency cost.
CurrencyUnits.MacroDropHint: Drag a macro here to link it.
CurrencyUnits.MacroDropZoneLabel: {field}: drag a macro here to link it.
CurrencyUnits.MacroReplaceHint: Drop a macro to replace it, or right-click to unlink.
CurrencyUnits.MacroConversionHint: Conversion between this unit and others is handled by your configured currency macros, matched by abbreviation.
CurrencyUnits.ProviderManagedHint: These denominations are managed by the selected provider ({provider}) and can't be edited here. You can reference them by abbreviation in recipe currency requirements.

Travel.Title: Travel
Travel.Subtitle: Manage Fabricate parties and set the current realm for the selected crafting system.

Tabs.Label: Travel sections
Tabs.MapLinksPlaceholder: Scene Region links will live here.

Inspector.PartiesPlaceholder: Select a party to see its details.
Inspector.RealmsPlaceholder: Select a realm to see its details.
Inspector.MapLinksPlaceholder: Select a region to map it to Scene Regions.

MapLinks.NoScene: Activate a scene to link its regions.
MapLinks.NoRegions: The active scene has no regions.
MapLinks.NoPartiesInMapRegion: No party travel markers are in this map region.
MapLinks.NoPartiesInFabricateRegion: No parties are in this Fabricate realm.
MapLinks.NotLinked: This map region isn’t linked to a Fabricate realm.

Parties.EnableNeedsTravelActor: Assign a travel actor to enable this party.

Members.NoActors: No character actors exist in this world yet.
Members.NoOtherParties: No other parties to move to.

Marker.Label: Travel marker
Marker.DropLabel: Drop an actor to set the travel marker
Marker.DropHint: Drag an actor here to set the travel marker. Right-click to clear.

Travel.WorldScopeNote: Parties are shared across every crafting system. Only the current-realm override below is specific to this system.
Travel.SelectPartyHint: Select a party to manage its members, travel actor, and current realm.
Travel.EnableToggleHint: Assign a travel actor to enable this party.
Travel.DeletePartyContent: Delete Fabricate party {name}? Members, travel actor, and current-realm overrides for this party are removed across every crafting system.
Travel.TravelActorHint: The actor that represents the party on a campaign map.
Travel.NoActorsInWorld: No actors exist in this world yet — create an Actor first.
Travel.OverrideHint: Set the party's current realm for this crafting system.
Travel.EvidenceNoRealms: No current realm set for this system.
Travel.InspectorNoPartySelected: Select a party to see its current-realm evidence.
Travel.DuplicateMember: This actor already belongs to another enabled party.
Travel.DuplicateTravelActor: This travel actor is already used by another enabled party.

Realms.NoEnvironments: No environments include this realm yet.
Realms.NoParties: No parties are currently in this realm.
Realms.NoAvailableEnvironments: All environments are in this realm.
Realms.NoIncludedEnvironments: No environments are in this realm yet.
Realms.BiomesHint: The terrain in this realm, drawn from the system biome vocabulary.
Realms.DeleteReferenced: It is still referenced by {environments} environment(s) and {parties} party override(s).

Tools.Title: Tools
Tools.Subtitle: Manage reusable gathering tools and configure how they behave when required by tasks.
Tools.EmptyHint: Add a reusable tool that gathering tasks can require.
Tools.RowCountHint: Define the behavior of tools when used in gathering tasks.
Tools.RequirementHint: Optional actor property that must be greater than zero for the actor to use this tool.
Tools.RequirementInstructions: Enter an actor roll-data property. The tool is available when the value is greater than zero.
Tools.AuthorityHint: Choose what decides whether a required tool breaks during an attempt.
Tools.AuthorityToolSpecificDesc: Each tool's own breakage mode decides whether it breaks.
Tools.AuthorityCheckDrivenDesc: Per-tool breakage modes are not evaluated (except Immune); the active check decides whether all required tools break.
Tools.OnBreakDestroyHint: The item is removed from the actor's inventory.
Tools.OnBreakFlagHint: The item remains but is flagged as broken.
Tools.OnBreakReplaceHint: The item is replaced with another component on the actor.
Tools.ReplacementSame: Replacement must differ from the tool component.
Tools.ChangesWarning: Changes to this tool will affect all tasks that require it.
Tools.LabelHint: Optional. Falls back to the component name.

DiscardDirty.Title: Discard unsaved tool changes?
DiscardDirty.Content: The tools library has unsaved changes. Discard them and continue?

ConcurrentEdit.Title: Tools were modified elsewhere
ConcurrentEdit.Content: The library has been modified outside this editor. Overwrite with your changes?

NavigationDirty.Title: Save unsaved tool changes?
NavigationDirty.Content: One or more gathering tools have unsaved changes.

Tools.SaveBlockedInvalid: Can't save: assign a component to every tool first. The highlighted tool still needs one.

Checks.Title: Checks
Checks.Subtitle: Configure how crafting, salvage, and gathering attempts are checked for the selected crafting system.

Active.Title: Active
Active.OptionalHint: Turn this check on to require a roll for the activity, or off to resolve it without one.
Active.RequiredHint: The current resolution mode requires this check, so it cannot be turned off here.
Active.GatheringHint: In d100 mode the gathering check is the fixed d100 roll and cannot be turned off here.

Crafting.PageLead: A system has a single crafting check. Its shape is determined by the system's resolution mode and preserved when you switch modes.
Crafting.ConfigHint: Roll, difficulty, and outcome settings for the crafting check will appear here.
Crafting.HelpDesc: The crafting check is shaped by the system resolution mode: simple and alchemy author a pass/fail check, routed authors outcome tiers, and progressive requires a check.
Crafting.TypeRelativeDesc: Tier thresholds are relative to the recipe DC, e.g. DC -5 or DC +10.
Crafting.TypeFixedDesc: Each tier owns a non-overlapping segment of the roll value range. Recipes do not have a DC in this mode.
Crafting.NoDice: No dice detected in this expression.
Crafting.NoOutcomes: No outcome tiers yet. Add the tiers this check routes results into.
Crafting.RangeInvalid: Some tiers have a start greater than their end.
Crafting.RangeOverlap: Some tier ranges overlap. Each value range must be unique.
Crafting.OutcomeUnnamed: Name every outcome tier — an unnamed tier cannot be routed to a result group.
Crafting.OutcomeNoSuccess: No outcome tier is marked as a Success — successful crafts can't route to a result set. Mark at least one tier as Success.
Crafting.ProgressiveLead: Roll a formula for a numeric value. Results are awarded in order, each spending its difficulty from the value, until the value can no longer cover the next. Per-die crits force award-all or award-none.
Crafting.AwardEqualDesc: Award each result in order while the value covers its full difficulty.
Crafting.AwardPartialDesc: Like equal, but the first result the value can't fully cover is still awarded, then awarding stops.
Crafting.AwardExceedDesc: Award each result in order only while the value strictly exceeds its difficulty.
Crafting.CritMultiDieHint: The value is the {die} total, from {min} to {max}.
Crafting.CritModifiedPoolHint: Critical rolls match a die's total. They aren't available for pools that keep, drop, explode, or reroll dice (e.g. 2d20kh1).
Crafting.DcStaticDesc: A fixed DC for every recipe, with optional named recipe tiers.
Crafting.DcDynamicDesc: A macro computes the DC from the ingredients, recipe, and actor.
Crafting.NoTiers: No tiers yet. Add named tiers a recipe can select to override the DC.
Crafting.MacroHint: The macro is run with the selected ingredient set, the recipe, and the actor, and must return the DC.
Crafting.MacroDropHint: Drag a macro here to compute the DC.

Salvage.PageLead: A system has a single salvage check. Its shape is determined by the system's salvage resolution mode and preserved when you switch modes.
Salvage.ConfigHint: Roll, difficulty, and outcome settings for the salvage check will appear here.
Salvage.ProgressiveLead: Progressive salvage spends the check value against each salvage result's difficulty, in order. The award mode decides how that spend stops.
Salvage.HelpDesc: The salvage check is shaped by the salvage resolution mode. Simple mode makes it optional; routed and progressive modes require it.

Gathering.PageLead: A system has a single gathering check. In d100 mode it is the fixed d100 roll and is not editable; progressive and routed modes let you define it. Per-task tuning adjusts the difficulty, not the roll.
Gathering.ConfigHint: Roll, difficulty, and outcome settings for the gathering check will appear here.
Gathering.D100Lead: In d100 mode the gathering check is a fixed d100 roll against each drop's chance. There is nothing to configure here.
Gathering.D100Hint: Switch the gathering economy to progressive or routed resolution to define an editable check. Per-task tuning adjusts difficulty, not the roll.
Gathering.HelpDesc: The gathering check is shaped by the gathering resolution mode. In d100 mode it is the fixed d100 roll; progressive and routed modes let you define it.

Validation.EmptyHint: Issues across the crafting, salvage, and gathering checks will be listed here.
Validation.Title: Validation
Validation.CheckHasSuccessOutcome: At least one outcome is a Success
Validation.IssueNoRollFormula: This check has no roll formula; it will not resolve until one is set.
Validation.IssueUnnamedOutcome: Name every outcome tier — an unnamed tier cannot be routed to a result group.
Validation.IssueNoSuccessOutcome: No outcome tier is marked as a Success — successful crafts can't route to a result set. Mark at least one tier as Success.
Validation.IssueRangeInvalid: Some tiers have a start greater than their end.
Validation.IssueRangeOverlap: Some tier ranges overlap. Each value range must be unique.

Breakage.Title: Check triggers
Breakage.Lead: Each trigger can force the check outcome and/or break every required tool for the attempt (immune tools are never broken).
Breakage.LeadOutcomeOnly: Each trigger can force the check outcome. Switch the tool-breakage authority to check-driven to let triggers break tools.
Breakage.Empty: No triggers yet. Add one to force an outcome or break tools on this check.
Breakage.NoTiers: Add named outcome tiers to target them.

SystemSettings.Title: Crafting System
SystemSettings.NoSystemSelectedHint: Create a new system to configure categories, tags, essences, and rules.
SystemSettings.Name: Name
SystemSettings.ResolutionModeHint: Controls how recipes in this system choose results and which advanced editor controls are available.
SystemSettings.ResolutionSimpleDesc: One ingredient set and one result group, with an optional pass/fail check.
SystemSettings.ResolutionRoutedDesc: Multiple ingredient sets and result groups; exactly one result is selected per craft, routed by the crafting check outcome or by the ingredients used.
SystemSettings.ResolutionRoutedByIngredientsDesc: Multiple ingredient sets and result groups; the chosen ingredient set selects which result group is produced. The crafting check is optional.
SystemSettings.ResolutionRoutedByCheckDesc: Multiple ingredient sets and result groups; the crafting check outcome selects which result group is produced. Requires a crafting check.
SystemSettings.ResolutionProgressiveDesc: One ingredient set and one ordered result group. A numeric check awards every result whose difficulty threshold is met.
SystemSettings.ResolutionAlchemyDesc: Players submit ingredient combinations directly to discover hidden recipes; one result is selected per attempt.
SystemSettings.ResolutionModeChangeContentDelete: {count} recipe(s) will be migrated to {mode}; {deleteCount} cannot be migrated and will be deleted: {names}.
SystemSettings.SalvageResolutionModeHint: Salvage has one ingredient, so ingredient-set routing does not apply. Components incompatible with the new salvage mode will have salvage disabled.
SystemSettings.SalvageResolutionSimpleDesc: One result group, with an optional pass/fail salvage check.
SystemSettings.SalvageResolutionProgressiveDesc: One ordered result group; a numeric salvage check awards every result whose difficulty threshold is met.
SystemSettings.SalvageResolutionRoutedDesc: Multiple result groups; the salvage check outcome selects which result group is returned.
SystemSettings.SalvageResolutionModeChangeContent: Changing the salvage resolution mode for {name}: components incompatible with the new salvage mode will have salvage disabled.

Categories.Title: Recipe Categories
Categories.Hint: Organize and filter recipes by category in admin and crafting views.

ItemTags.Title: Item Tags
ItemTags.Hint: Use tags for categorization, sorting, and search in components.

Essences.Title: Essences
Essences.Hint: Define essence types with descriptions and optional source items.
Essences.NoComponentsAvailable: No components have been added to this system yet.

MultiStepRecipes.Title: Multi-Step Recipes
MultiStepRecipes.Hint: Allow recipes to define explicit ordered steps with per-step ingredient/result and time requirements.

Gathering.Title: Gathering
Gathering.Hint: Enable gathering environments and task configuration for this crafting system.

TimeRequirements.Title: Time Requirements
TimeRequirements.Hint: Allow step-level crafting durations using minutes, hours, days, months, and years.

CurrencyRequirements.Title: Currency Requirements
CurrencyRequirements.Hint: Configure this system's currencies and how they are spent, via system adapter or macros.

PropertyMacros.Title: Property Calculation Macros
PropertyMacros.Hint: Use macros to compute result property updates from crafting context.

CraftingChecks.Title: Crafting Checks
CraftingChecks.Hint: Choose a system-level check macro that returns pass/fail or named outcomes. Leave the macro blank to disable crafting checks.

Alchemy.Title: Alchemy
Alchemy.Hint: Configure the learning and failure behavior used by alchemy attempts in this crafting system.
Alchemy.LearnOnCraft: Learn recipes after a successful attempt
Alchemy.ConsumeOnFail: Consume submitted ingredients on failed attempts

OutcomeRouting.Title: Outcome Routing
OutcomeRouting.Hint: Map crafting-check outcomes to specific result groups when complex recipes are enabled.

EffectTransfer.Title: Effect Transfer
EffectTransfer.Hint: Transfer active effects from consumed ingredients to crafted result items.

RecipeVisibility.Title: Recipe Visibility
RecipeVisibility.Hint: Control which players can see recipes.
RecipeVisibility.PlayerNote: Per-recipe visibility restrictions can be configured in each recipe's editor. Restricted recipes are hidden from all players by default unless specific users are allowed.
RecipeVisibility.DragDropEnabled: Learn recipes from actor item drops
RecipeVisibility.LearnLimitRecipesHint: Cap how many recipes a player can learn from one recipe item.
RecipeVisibility.ListModeHint: How recipes are exposed to players.
RecipeVisibility.KnowledgeModeHint: How players gain access to a recipe.
RecipeVisibility.ItemLimitUsesHint: Cap how many times a recipe item grants access.
RecipeVisibility.ConsumeOnLearnHint: Delete the recipe item when a player learns it.
RecipeVisibility.DragDropEnabledHint: Dropping the item on an actor learns the recipe.

Items.DropZoneLabel: Drag items from sidebar/compendiums here to add them to this crafting system.

Environments.Title: Gathering Environments
Environments.EmptyHint: Create a gathering environment to start configuring where players can gather.
Environments.EmptyActionHint: Create the first environment and configure its gathering tasks.
Environments.StoreUnavailable: Gathering environment data is not available.
Environments.Name: Name
Environments.LinkedSceneReferenceWarning: This linked scene UUID is preserved. If the scene no longer resolves, players are blocked until the reference is repaired.
Environments.NoTasksHint: Add a task so this environment has an activity players can attempt.
Environments.ImmediateTaskHint: Immediate task: resolves as soon as the player starts it.
Environments.TimeRequirementHint: A timed task creates an active gathering run and completes after this duration.
Environments.DefaultFailureOutcomeHint: Default failure feedback is used when no custom outcome is configured.
Environments.FailureOutcomeHint: Used when routed or progressive resolution fails. Use result group name "fail" for the canonical failure keyword.
Environments.NoVisibilityHint: Enable a gate when only some actors should see this task.
Environments.NoToolsHint: Add a tool when this task should require equipment that can break or wear out.
Environments.ToolRequirementHint: Optional expression that must be truthy for the actor to use this tool.
Environments.NoResultGroupsHint: Add a group to define what this task can award.
Environments.NoResultsHint: Add a result item to this group so successful gathering awards something.
Environments.DeleteContent: Delete gathering environment {name}? This also cleans active and historical gathering runs that reference it.
Environments.DiscardDirtyContent: The current gathering environment has unsaved changes. Save them and continue, or discard them?

Gathering.Title: Gathering
Gathering.Subtitle: Choose an actor and gather from available environments.
Gathering.InventoryTarget: Gathered results go to this actor.

Empty.NoSelectableActorsHint: Ask the GM to grant ownership of an actor before gathering.
Empty.SelectEnvironmentForTasks: Select an environment to view its gathering tasks.
Empty.SelectEnvironmentForDetails: Select an environment to view its details.

Blocked.NoSelectableActors: You do not have an actor available for gathering.
Blocked.InvalidRememberedActor: The remembered gathering actor is no longer available.
Blocked.ActorNotSelectable: The selected actor is not available for gathering.
Blocked.NoVisibleTargetedTasks: No visible gathering tasks are available.
Blocked.BlindSoleTaskHidden: No gathering action is available here.
Blocked.NoVisibleTasks: No visible gathering tasks are available.
Blocked.SceneTokenBlocked: Gathering is blocked by the linked scene or token position.
Blocked.SceneMissing: View the linked scene before gathering here.
Blocked.TokenMissing: Move the selected actor token to this environment scene before gathering.
Blocked.DuplicateActiveRun: This actor already has an active gathering run for this task.
Blocked.ToolBlocked: One or more required tools are missing, broken, or fail their requirement.
Blocked.GamePaused: Gathering is unavailable while the game is paused.
Blocked.MissingReference: Gathering cannot start because a referenced record is missing.
Blocked.SystemDisabled: Gathering is disabled for this crafting system.
Blocked.TaskHidden: This gathering task is not visible to the selected actor.
Blocked.TaskMisconfigured: This gathering task needs GM configuration before it can be used.
Blocked.RunCreationFailed: Gathering could not create an active run.
Blocked.AttemptLimitExhausted: No attempts remain for this gathering task.
Blocked.StaminaBlocked: The selected actor does not have enough gathering stamina.
Blocked.BlindNoCandidate: There is nothing you can gather here right now.
Blocked.ConditionsBlocked: Current weather or time-of-day does not allow this task.
Blocked.LocationBlocked: Not available in the party's current realm.

Guidance.Travel: Travel to a realm where this is available.
